Hello Hubern, this is Jazzmine with allure Natural beauty. I see Zoca is still connected to my google business page. How do we go about initiating the separation? Zoca is still linked as my landing page.

cause_analysis.narrative: Allure Natural Beauty churned on 2026-02-16 after 126 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 32-day silence starting 2026-02-13. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 33 times, but the client only replied 6. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-02-13 via sms, client wrote: "Hi I have partnered with Zoca already. Thank you…" — no outbound response in 32 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-04-22 via sms, client wrote: "Hello Hubern, this is Jazzmine with allure Natural beauty. I see Zoca is still connected to my google business page. How…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
